title: glaucium calycinum
intro: Glaucium calycinum, also known as the scorpion's tail or horn poppy, is a flowering plant in the poppy family Papaveraceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include analgesic and anti-inflammatory effects, making it useful in treating pain and inflammation. The health benefits of Glaucium calycinum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate symptoms of cough and cold, and provide relief from menstrual cramps and other menstrual disorders. Herbal preparations of Glaucium calycinum may be taken in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
